nasb.text: They also broke down the sacred pillar of Baal and broke down the house of Baal, and made it a latrine to this day.

esv.text: And they demolished the pillar of Baal, and demolished the house of Baal, and made it a latrine to this day.

cnv.text: 他們毀壞了巴力的神柱，又拆毀了巴力廟，作為廁所，直到今日。

ccb.text: 他们摧毁了巴力的神柱和庙，把庙当作厕所，至今未变。
